title: cleanup: remove obsolete Devvit Reddit app
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Removes the superseded Devvit-based Reddit app under `social/reddit`.
- Keeps the active Reddit path through `publish_daily.py` / `publish_weekly.py` intact.
- Drops formatter/CI exclusions that only existed for the removed Reddit package.

## Validation
- `npx biome check --write package.json biome.jsonc`
- `python3 -m py_compile social/scripts/publish_daily.py social/scripts/publish_weekly.py social/scripts/common.py`
- `rg -n "social/reddit|Devvit|!\*\*/reddit|node_modules\|reddit|reddit\|dist|reddit, node_modules" . --glob '!**/node_modules/**' --glob '!**/package-lock.json' --glob '!**/.git/**'`
- `git diff --check origin/main`

gist.headline: Sweeping up the Reddit crumbs
gist.blurb: We've swept away the old Devvit-based Reddit app from our social pipeline. The active Reddit publishing scripts are still buzzing along perfectly.
gist.summary: Removed the obsolete Devvit-based Reddit app from the social pipeline, cleaning up associated CI exclusions and dependencies.
gist.impact: This reduces repository bloat and simplifies the CI configuration without affecting our active Reddit publishing pipeline.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot cleaning up or sweeping away old code/files, while the Nomnom creature eats the deprecated Devvit documents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny scarf, sweeping up old dusty code blocks with a small broom. The round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of deprecated documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
